bird.name: St. Lucia thrasher
bird.summary: The St. Lucia thrasher (Ramphocinclus sanctaeluciae), locally known as the gorge blanc, is a species of mimid in the genus Ramphocinclus.

relations.subject: St. Lucia thrasher
relations.evidence: However the species was rediscovered in 1932 near Desbarras. In 1987 a census by the University of East Anglia found only 58 pairs. Its greatest threat has historically been habitat destruction, with land clearing for plantations and destructions caused by livestock being the driving factors.
